headline: US lawmakers ask whether Nvidia CEO's smuggling remarks misled regulators
summary: Two U.S. senators have asked U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to investigate whether remarks by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang may have ‌misled U.S. officials and influenced their decision to grant Nvidia licenses to send its ‌AI chips to China.  The letter on Monday from Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jim Banks, both members of the Senate Banking ​Committee, comes after the Justice Department last week charged three men tied to Nvidia customer Super Micro Computer, including one of the company's co-founders who was photographed near Huang at an Nvidia conference last week, with smuggling billions of dollars worth of AI servers into China.

raw.headline: US lawmakers ask whether Nvidia CEO's smuggling remarks misled regulators

The letter on Monday from Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jim Banks, both members of the Senate Banking ​Committee, comes after the Justice Department last week charged three men tied to Nvidia customer Super Micro Computer, including one of the company's co-founders who was photographed near Huang at an Nvidia conference last week, with smuggling billions of dollars worth of AI servers into China.

headline: 1 Value Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

headline: Mirantis Announces Support for NVIDIA NCX Infra Controller, Building on Open Source to Deliver AI Infrastructure
summary: AMSTERDAM, March 24, 2026--KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026--Mirantis, delivering Kubernetes-native infrastructure for AI, today announced support for the NVIDIA NCX Infra Controller, an open-source technology to build next-generation AI cloud platforms, plus progress with an ecosystem of partners delivering an open, composable infrastructure platform based on k0rdent — purpose-built to support AI workloads.
